overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the character Link running through a rocky mountainous landscape with red corruption vegetation and atmospheric mist. The character traverses cracked stone terrain, passes through patches of green grass, encounters a small creature, and climbs toward a rocky valley under bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky highland plateau with mist and distant spires

agents.ego_description: running steadily across the cracked rocky terrain toward the distant mountain spires

entered.detail: tall pointed rock formation dominating the center horizon
massive natural stone arch formation on the right side
red glowing corruption plants covering the left hillside
large cylindrical stone pillar lying on its side
low-lying fog drifting across the rocky ground surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide rocky plateau with cracked dark stone underfoot. Mist drifts across the ground as Link runs forward toward a dramatic tall rock spire in the distance. To the right, a large natural rock arch frames the horizon, while red gloom vegetation covers the left hillside. A fallen stone pillar lies on the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain slope with mixed grass and rock terrain

events.description: encounters a small white creature standing on the right side of the path
ground surface transitions to patches of bright green grass mixed with rock

agents.ego_description: continuing to run forward through the grassy transition zone, passing the small creature

notable_agents.action: small white creature standing still on the path before moving away

entered.detail: small white furry creature resembling a rabbit or similar animal
vibrant green grass strips growing between the rocky cracks

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to include vibrant green grass patches growing between the rocks. Link passes a small white creature on the right side of the path. The large rock arch and mist fade from view behind, while the tall spire grows larger ahead. The fallen stone pillar recedes to the left as the character moves past it.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain pass leading to canyon descent

events.description: strong lens flare appears as the camera angle shifts toward the sun
begins descending into a deep rocky valley or canyon

agents.ego_description: climbing uphill over rocky outcrops then descending into the valley ahead

entered.detail: deep rocky canyon opening up ahead with steep walls
massive orange-brown boulders scattered on the left slope
steep rock walls forming the sides of the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a rocky slope with large boulders scattered around, the tall spire now visible to the left. A strong lens flare appears as the sun hits the camera angle. Reaching the crest, Link begins descending into a deep rocky valley with steep canyon walls visible on both sides. The grassy patches and small creature are left behind as the terrain returns to bare rock.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a desolate rocky plateau that gradually ascends and descends through a rugged mountain valley. It begins on a wide expanse of cracked dark stone where mist drifts across the ground and red gloom vegetation clings to the hillsides as Link runs toward a distant rock spire. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts to include vibrant patches of green grass and a small white creature, while the initial rock arch and fallen pillar recede into the distance. The scene then climbs a rocky slope scattered with large boulders, triggering a bright lens flare as the sun hits the camera. Finally, the camera crests the ridge and descends into a deep rocky valley, leaving the greenery behind as the landscape returns to steep, bare canyon walls.
